items.title: Knicks Star Jalen Brunson Says It Was ‘Really Cool’ Having Taylor Swift at NBA Finals — But He Wasn’t at Her Wedding
items.summary: While the NBA Finals MVP didn't confirm whether he and the rest of New York's starting five were invited, he did say he wasn't there.

items.title: Robbie Williams Addresses Viral Video Showing White Substance During His World Cup Interview
items.summary: Robbie Williams has been open about his struggles with substance abuse. The topic was explored in his 2023 Netflix docuseries, and he now boasts 25 years of sobriety. But a video has gone viral of a white substance falling from his face onto a microphone during a World Cup interview, and the British singer acknowledged the controversy.

items.title: John Glacier – “Bond Girl”
items.summary: Last year, John Glacier released her memorable debut album Like A Ribbon. Since then, the London-based musician has collaborated with Blondshell and MJ Cole, and today she's back with a chic new number called "Bond Girl." The track is low-key and sleek, co-produced with Take A Daytrip and taking inspiration from early Detroit techno. It comes with a luxurious music video directed by Léa Ceheivi.
